conditions: 6 AM—The weekend is here, so why not set your sights on an incredible day of aerial tram flights and invigorating alpine delights? Clouds will cover the sky for the duration, adding an air of mysterious curiosity to the terrain that lies over that next undulation. Come ready to play in temperatures that reach the low 20s atop Rendezvous Mountain and the upper 30s at her base. Moderate winds will shift out of the west and blow between 5 and 25 mph. The competitors in the annual Dick's Ditch Classic are ready to send it with style and splendor, so come cheer them on if you're not a contender. Let them inspire you to be a top descender, and by the end of the day, you'll be packed with memories to always remember. -Lege
